overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through rain-soaked Night City. The journey traverses covered walkways, neon-lit corridors, narrow back alleys with dumpsters, and emerges into a large commercial plaza surrounded by massive digital billboards. The atmosphere is dark and moody with heavy rain, fog, and pervasive neon lighting in green and red hues.

turning into narrow corridor with green neon lighting

woman in red outfit with illuminated umbrella passing by the camera

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered industrial walkway with metal walls on the left and commercial buildings on the right. The camera follows a man and child walking ahead. A woman with a red illuminated umbrella passes by in the foreground, temporarily occluding the view. The environment is sheltered from the rain with artificial overhead lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial corridor with green neon signs and digital advertisements

events.description: entering area dominated by green neon lighting
approaching the Chillax club entrance with bright signage

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow corridor passing pedestrians standing near doorways

group of people conversing near the green neon sign

large screen displaying advertisements with grid pattern
blue neon sign reading CHILLAX above a doorway
industrial metal beams and ductwork overhead

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow enclosed corridor illuminated by green neon lights. The camera moves past pedestrians standing near doorways and large digital screens. The atmosphere shifts to a darker, more enclosed space with the Chillax club entrance visible ahead, marked by bright blue neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: back alley with dumpsters, fire escapes, and graffiti-covered walls

events.description: exiting covered corridor into open rainy alley with dumpsters
rain becomes visibly heavier with water pooling on ground

agents.ego_description: navigating through wet back alleys littered with trash and debris

notable_agents.action: person sitting on cardboard near a dumpster

entered.detail: white metal fire escape stairs on building facade
large green dumpsters with trash bags
metal walkway bridge connecting buildings above
walls covered in colorful graffiti and tags

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered corridor, the scene opens into a narrow back alley exposed to heavy rain. The ground is wet with puddles reflecting the ambient light. Metal fire escapes climb the building walls on the left while dumpsters and trash bags line the right side. The camera moves through the cluttered space toward a narrow passage with graffiti-covered walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: large commercial plaza surrounded by towering buildings with massive digital billboards

events.description: emerging from narrow alley into expansive open plaza
turning right to view massive vertical billboards on building walls

agents.ego_description: walking through the large plaza observing the towering digital advertisements and surrounding architecture

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red hat walking across the plaza

entered.detail: giant digital screens covering building walls showing advertisements
towering futuristic buildings surrounding the plaza
central pedestal with rotating digital advertisement
red and white striped barriers along the walkway

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a vast commercial plaza surrounded by towering skyscrapers. Massive digital billboards illuminate the rainy night with bright advertisements covering entire building facades. The camera moves through the open space, turning to reveal the scale of the vertical advertisements while rain continues to fall, creating reflections on the wet concrete ground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sheltered industrial walkway into the expansive, rain-drenched scale of a commercial plaza. It begins within a covered passage where the camera follows a man and child, momentarily obscured by a woman carrying a red illuminated umbrella. As the camera moves forward, the environment shifts into a dark, enclosed corridor bathed in green neon light and passing the blue signage of the Chillax club. The scene then opens into a narrow, rain-soaked back alley cluttered with dumpsters and fire escapes before turning through a graffiti-covered passage. Finally, the space expands into a vast plaza surrounded by towering skyscrapers and massive digital billboards that cast bright advertisements across the wet concrete ground.
